name: make-deepseek-great-again
description: mosga (Make-OpenSource-Great-Again) — safely contribute local AI coding-session data to the open-source community. v0.1 slice 1: monorepo skeleton + contracts + session-readers.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mosga/contracts && npm run build -w @mosga/session-readers && npm run build -w @mosga/sanitizer && npm run build -w @mosga/ui && npm run build -w @mosga/daemon
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mosga/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @mosga/session-readers && npm run typecheck -w @mosga/sanitizer && npm run typecheck -w @mosga/ui && npm run typecheck -w @mosga/daemon
